title: AN ACT STANDARDIZING THE SALARIES OF HEADS OF BUREAUS AND OFFICES AND  OTHER OFFICIALS UNDER THE DEPARTMENT OF LABOR.

chunks.text:
S. No. 613 H. No. 13523 / 65 OG No. 18, 4501 (May 5, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5209, June 15, 1968 ]

AN ACT STANDARDIZING THE SALARIES OF HEADS OF BUREAUS AND OFFICES AND OTHER OFFICIALS UNDER THE DEPARTMENT OF LABOR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 2. Heads of bureaus and offices shall receive equal traveling and representation allowances to be paid out of the savings of their respective bureaus and offices.

SEC. 3. In order to carry out the provisions of this Act, the sum of two hundred thousand pesos or so much thereof as is necessary is hereby authorized to be apÂpropriated out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, or from any savings of the Department of Labor to cover salary differentials from July one, nineteen hundred sixty-seven to June thirty, nineteen hundred sixty-eight. Thereafter, the said sum shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted into law without executive signature on June 15, 1968.
